/usr/bin/g++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libozimmu.so -o libozimmu.so CMakeFiles/ozimmu.dir/src/handle.cu.o CMakeFiles/ozimmu.dir/src/config.cu.o CMakeFiles/ozimmu.dir/src/split.cu.o CMakeFiles/ozimmu.dir/src/gemm.cu.o CMakeFiles/ozimmu.dir/src/cublas.cu.o CMakeFiles/ozimmu.dir/src/cublas_helper.cu.o CMakeFiles/ozimmu.dir/src/culip.cu.o CMakeFiles/ozimmu.dir/cmake_device_link.o  -lcuda -lcublas -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl  -L"/usr/local/cuda-13.2/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs" -L"/usr/local/cuda-13.2/targets/x86_64-linux/lib"
